title: Paraguay squad announcement | FIFA World Cup 2026
original_text:
Paraguay head coach Gustavo Alfaro has chosen his 26-man squad ahead of the tournament in Canada, Mexico and USA.
Paraguay have announced their 26-man squad for the FIFA World Cup 2026™. Head coach Gustavo Alfaro revealed the side that will take on Australia, Türkiye and co-hosts USA in Group D in what will be La Albirroja's first appearance at the global finals since South Africa 2010.
Richly talented 22-year-old attacker Julio Enciso is one of the headline names of the Argentinian tactician's roster, joining the likes of Atlanta United star Miguel Almiron and forward Antonio Sanabria.
Alfaro's defence is sure to be in good hands with a pair of centre-backs who ply their trade at the top of Brazilian football in Gustavo Gomez of Palmeiras and Fabian Balbuena of Gremio.
Explore hospitality packages for Paraguay's FIFA World Cup 2026™ matchesExplore hospitality packages for Paraguay's FIFA World Cup 2026™ matches
Paraguay's World Cup squadParaguay's World Cup squad
GoalkeepersGoalkeepers
Orlando Gill Roberto Fernandez Gaston Olveira
DefendersDefenders
Juan Caceres Gustavo Velazquez Gustavo Gomez Junior Alonso Jose Canale Omar Alderete Alexandro Maidana Fabian Balbuena
MidfieldersMidfielders
Diego Gomez Mauricio Magalhaes Damian Bobadilla Braian Ojeda Andres Cubas Matias Galarza Alejandro Gamarra
ForwardsForwards
Gustavo Caballero Ramon Sosa Alex Arce Isidro Pitta Gabriel Avalos Miguel Almiron Julio Enciso Antonio Sanabria
All squads are provisional until the final list of 26 players is announced by FIFA, following their submission by participating teams, on 2 June.
Paraguay's World Cup fixturesParaguay's World Cup fixtures
12 June: USA v Paraguay - Los Angeles Stadium
19 June: Türkiye v Paraguay - San Francisco Bay Area Stadium
25 June: Paraguay v Australia - San Francisco Bay Area Stadium
